requirement_topic.zh: 良好生产规范（GMP）——英国同化法规2023/2006
requirement_topic.zht: 良好生產規範（GMP）——英國同化法規2023/2006

summary.en: UK-assimilated Regulation (EC) No 2023/2006 (GMP Regulation for food-contact materials) requires that businesses manufacturing FCMs and articles operate a documented Quality Assurance (QA) system and a Quality Control (QC) system throughout the supply chain. Key obligations include: (1) documented manufacturing processes, quality specifications, and testing procedures; (2) traceability records enabling identification of materials and suppliers; (3) product specifications confirming compliance with applicable FCM legislation (including migration limits); (4) adequate staff training; (5) corrective-action procedures. The GMP Regulation applies at every stage of manufacture — raw material, intermediate, and finished article. Importers placing Chinese-made FCMs on the UK market become responsible business operators and must ensure their supply chain meets UK GMP requirements.
summary.zh: 英国同化法规（EC）No 2023/2006（食品接触材料GMP法规）要求在整个供应链中生产FCMs和制品的企业建立有据可查的质量保证（QA）体系和质量控制（QC）体系。主要义务包括：（1）记录生产过程、质量规范和测试程序；（2）可追溯记录，能够识别材料和供应商；（3）确认符合适用FCM法规（包括迁移限量）的产品规范；（4）足够的员工培训；（5）纠正措施程序。GMP法规适用于生产的每个阶段——原材料、中间品和成品。将中国制造FCMs投放英国市场的进口商成为责任业务经营者，必须确保其供应链满足英国GMP要求。
summary.zht: 英國同化法規（EC）No 2023/2006（食品接觸材料GMP法規）要求在整個供應鏈中生產FCMs和製品的企業建立有據可查的質量保證（QA）體系和質量控制（QC）體系。主要義務包括：（1）記錄生產過程、質量規範和測試程序；（2）可追溯記錄，能夠識別材料和供應商；（3）確認符合適用FCM法規（包括遷移限量）的產品規範；（4）足夠的員工培訓；（5）糾正措施程序。GMP法規適用於生產的每個階段——原材料、中間品和成品。將中國製造FCMs投放英國市場的進口商成為責任業務經營者，必須確保其供應鏈滿足英國GMP要求。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EC) No 2023/2006 as retained/assimilated in UK law (GMP for food-contact materials)
FSA — food-contact materials business guidance — food.gov.uk

summary.en: China's GMP requirements for FCMs are set out in GB 31603-2015 (General hygienic practices for food-contact material enterprises), administered by SAMR/NHC. GB 31603-2015 covers manufacturing environment, personnel, raw material control, production process, inspection, documentation, and traceability — functionally analogous to UK-assimilated Reg 2023/2006. However, Chinese manufacturers certified or audited under GB 31603-2015 have not undergone a UK/EU-recognised conformity assessment. Their QA documentation will typically be in Chinese, and the scope, depth, and format of traceability records may differ from what UK importers are expected to hold.
summary.zh: 中国FCMs的GMP要求规定于GB 31603-2015（食品接触材料及制品生产通用卫生规范），由SAMR/NHC管理。GB 31603-2015涵盖生产环境、人员、原材料控制、生产过程、检验、文件记录和可追溯性——在功能上与英国同化法规2023/2006类似。然而，依据GB 31603-2015经过认证或审核的中国制造商并未经历英国/欧盟认可的合格评定。其质量保证文件通常为中文，可追溯记录的范围、深度和格式可能与英国进口商需持有的文件不同。
summary.zht: 中國FCMs的GMP要求規定於GB 31603-2015（食品接觸材料及製品生產通用衛生規範），由SAMR/NHC管理。GB 31603-2015涵蓋生產環境、人員、原材料控制、生產過程、檢驗、文件記錄和可追溯性——在功能上與英國同化法規2023/2006類似。然而，依據GB 31603-2015經過認證或審核的中國製造商並未經歷英國/歐盟認可的合格評定。其質量保證文件通常為中文，可追溯記錄的範圍、深度和格式可能與英國進口商需持有的文件不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 31603-2015 — General hygienic practices for food-contact material enterprises (NHC/SAMR)

gap.en: The structural gap is importer accountability. Under UK-assimilated Reg 2023/2006, the UK importer is the responsible business operator for GMP compliance. The Chinese manufacturer's GB 31603-2015 QA records do not substitute for the UK-required documentation chain. Practical gaps include: (1) English-language versions of QA records and product specifications; (2) supply-chain traceability documentation in a format acceptable to UK enforcement authorities; (3) documented evidence that the manufacturer's process produces articles meeting UK migration limits (not just Chinese limits). The importer must conduct supplier audits or obtain sufficient documentation to demonstrate GMP compliance — they cannot rely solely on the Chinese manufacturer's self-attestation under GB 31603.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于进口商责任。依据英国同化法规2023/2006，英国进口商是GMP合规的责任业务经营者。中国制造商的GB 31603-2015 QA记录不能替代英国所要求的文件链。实际差距包括：（1）QA记录和产品规范的英文版本；（2）英国执法机构可接受格式的供应链可追溯性文件；（3）证明制造商工艺能生产符合英国迁移限量（而非仅符合中国限量）制品的书面证据。进口商必须开展供应商审核或获取足够文件以证明GMP合规——不能仅依赖中国制造商在GB 31603下的自我声明。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於進口商責任。依據英國同化法規2023/2006，英國進口商是GMP合規的責任業務經營者。中國製造商的GB 31603-2015 QA記錄不能替代英國所要求的文件鏈。實際差距包括：（1）QA記錄和產品規範的英文版本；（2）英國執法機構可接受格式的供應鏈可追溯性文件；（3）證明製造商工藝能生產符合英國遷移限量（而非僅符合中國限量）製品的書面證據。進口商必須開展供應商審核或獲取足夠文件以證明GMP合規——不能僅依賴中國製造商在GB 31603下的自我聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UK-assimilated Regulation 2023/2006 applies to all FCM manufacturers and importers placing goods on the GB market; NI: EU Regulation 2023/2006 applies directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 31603-2015 under NHC/SAMR for domestic FCM manufacturers

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UK-assimilated GMP Regulation 2023/2006 makes UK importers the responsible operators for the GMP compliance of Chinese-manufactured FCMs. GB 31603-2015 is a functional analogue but is not recognised as satisfying UK requirements. UK importers must establish English-language documentation, supply-chain traceability, and evidence of UK-limit compliance. Supplier audits or third-party assessments are advisable.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】英国同化GMP法规2023/2006使英国进口商成为中国制造FCMs的GMP合规责任方。GB 31603-2015在功能上类似，但不被认可为满足英国要求。英国进口商必须建立英文文件、供应链可追溯性，并提供符合英国限量的证明。建议开展供应商审核或第三方评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】英國同化GMP法規2023/2006使英國進口商成為中國製造FCMs的GMP合規責任方。GB 31603-2015在功能上類似，但不被認可為滿足英國要求。英國進口商必須建立英文文件、供應鏈可追溯性，並提供符合英國限量的證明。建議開展供應商審核或第三方評估。
